content: I will update `task.md` to add and check off the new database seeding task.

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"task","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Task checklist updated to verify that the 15 general pujas have been seeded in the database."}
args.CodeContent:
"# Task List - Fix Puja Page Showing Store Items

- [x] Modify `app/(tabs)/puja.tsx`
  - [x] Update `loadGeneralPoojas` query table & column mapping
  - [x] Update postgres changes subscription channel table to `general_poojas`
- [x] Modify `app/all_pujas.tsx`
  - [x] Update `loadGeneralPoojas` query table & column mapping
  - [x] Update postgres changes subscription channel table to `general_poojas`
- [x] Modify `app/puja_detail.tsx`
  - [x] Add `general_poojas` table check to the load fallback logic
- [x] Modify `app/settings_detail.tsx`
  - [x] Fetch temple catalog names from both `general_poojas` and `website_pooja_products`

## Follow-up 1: Revert Shop Screen (`app/all_pujas.tsx`) to show Store Products
- [x] Revert `app/all_pujas.tsx` query to `website_pooja_products`
- [x] Revert `app/all_pujas.tsx` realtime subscription to `website_pooja_products`

## Follow-up 2: Fix "View All Pujas" Button in Puja Tab
- [x] Create new screen `app/all_general_pujas.tsx` querying `general_poojas`
- [x] Redirect "View All Pujas" button in `app/(tabs)/puja.tsx` to `/all_general_pujas`

## Follow-up 3: Fix flashing of Mock Pujas on Shop Screen
- [x] Add `isLoading` state and `ActivityIndicator` loading view to `app/all_pujas.tsx`
- [x] Change initial title value in state to match "Store" (database value) to prevent title shift/flashes

## Seeding
- [x] Seed 15 detailed entries in `general_poojas` using `seed_15_general_poojas.js`
"
args.Description: "Updating checklist in task.md to include seeding task"
